Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}You know how every school has at least one mystery that no one can solve?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}There's one here too, you know...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}Like the sculpture in the art room that moves by itself! ...It sounded cooler in my head.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}Hey, have you heard about the ghost in the home ec room?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}Impressive. You know the school well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}I heard there's a ghost in there, man.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}The sewing machine will be on, but no one's inside... Or you'll hear weird voices coming from in there...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}Hey, I read those ghost stories that were being spread around school on the Internet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}You know, the ones about those students who died, became ghosts, and ate humans...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}Wait, how would anybody know they ate humans? There wouldn't be any remains.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}I heard that those students who were sent to the hospital were bullying other students...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}Maybe it was their victims who did that to them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}You remember that ghost story about the angry spirit?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}Well, I guess there's another version that's different from that other one.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}Did ya know that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}Well, I'd love to tell you it myself, but I'm kinda shaky on the details.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}You know those two girls that are always gossiping in the hallway on the second floor...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}I'm sure they know the story inside and out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}I heard it's based on a real incident from ten years ago...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}...and they never figured out what happened.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}Don't you think that makes the story so much creepier?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}Hey, have you ever heard about that creepy place located on the outskirts of Port Island Station?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}Well, I accidentally ended up there once. Dude, I was so scared I almost pissed myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It was full of all these scary-looking guys...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}From what I heard, they meet there a few times every month on Saturday nights.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}But be careful if you go there, dude...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}That place is dangerous. Real dangerous.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}Have you heard that crazy rumor that's going around online?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}Apparently, you can get revenge on someone just by signing up at a website.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}That revenge request website might be real, y'know.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}I know a guy personally who signed up. Well, actually, it was his sister...'s friend...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}Hey, did you know there's an observatory somewhere on campus?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}Rumor has it there is one, anyway... But I've never seen anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}Hey, you want to hear something weird about the observatory?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}No one's ever been there. In fact, no one even knows HOW to get there.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}It's like no one was meant to go there... ever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Don't you think there's something strange about the observatory?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}I mean, no one has ever heard about anyone actually going inside of it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}And there's no trace of it ever being used.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}Well, I guess if no one's ever been inside, then obviously there wouldn't be a trace of it being used...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}I gave up trying to learn about the observatory.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}Actually, I learned that there's nothing to learn about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}I just can't believe the school built that thing. I mean, why build it if no one's going to use it?[n]{f 1 1}
